message:
fix(config): allow double-dot filenames in palette path validation

Replace inline path traversal check with isUnsafeProjectRelativePath()
helper that correctly distinguishes directory traversal (../ prefix or
bare ..) from legitimate filenames containing double dots (e.g.
palette..md). The previous check rejected any path containing ".."
anywhere in the string, which was overly broad.

Tests: TestMergeConfig_PaletteFileAllowsDoubleDotFilename verifies that
a palette file named "palette..md" is loaded successfully.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
